S: Pack 25 rectangular boxes into a single 1000x1000x1000 bin, respecting physical constraints including support requirements for fragile items.

K.name: Bin Boundaries
K.description: All items must be fully contained within the 1000x1000x1000 bin dimensions.

K.name: No Floating
K.description: Each item must have full support from either the bin floor or other items below it.

K.name: No Partial Support
K.description: Items must be fully supported across their entire bottom surface area.

K.name: Fragile Item Support
K.description: Fragile items (4 of 25) cannot be directly supported by other items; they must rest on the bin floor.

X: items: array of 25 objects, each with keys l, w, h, fragile
Y: A packing configuration specifying the 3D position (x, y, z) for each item within the bin, with all constraints satisfied.
Z: Maximize the number of items packed into the single bin while satisfying all physical constraints.
